title: Movie quotes drill
text: May the Force be with you. I'll be back. To infinity and beyond! Why so serious? With great power comes great responsibility.
tips: Iconic movie quotes — already in your memory
Shift timing matters — practice the entry

character_tips.anna: Movie lines you already know. Type by memory, not by sight.
character_tips.maxim: Pop culture phrases live in muscle memory long after the movie.
